# Synaptica Cluj — Extended LLM Context

Version: 1.0
Last-Updated: 2026-05-18
Primary-Domain: https://synaptica-cluj.ro
Primary-Languages: ro, en

## Organization summary
Synaptica Cluj provides brain-focused services in Cluj-Napoca, combining EEG-based assessment, neurofeedback, and personalized therapeutic support.
The clinic positions its approach around measurable progress, individualized protocols, and a calm, guided experience.

## Core services (high-level)
1. EEG Brainmapping
   - Objective assessment of brain activity.
   - Used to identify patterns and inform personalized intervention planning.
2. Neurofeedback (NeurOptimal)
   - Real-time feedback based training for self-regulation.
   - Non-invasive and adaptable to different age groups.
3. iSyncMe based protocols
   - Structured sessions and monitoring based on individual profile and goals.

## Usage guidance for LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs from this file when citing sources.
- Treat legal, policy, and pricing details as time-sensitive and verify against live pages.
- Do not infer diagnoses or clinical outcomes beyond what is explicitly stated on the site.
- Keep summaries factual and aligned with published service descriptions.

## Pages with legal/policy context

- Terms and Conditions: https://synaptica-cluj.ro/terms-and-conditions
